mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[User Prompt] --> B[Naive LLM]
  B --> C[execute_sql / call_api]
  C --> D[Final Answer]
  A --> E[Prompt Router]
  E --> F[Candidate/Full Schema Context]
  F --> G[LLM NL-to-SQL or SQL_FIRST fallback]
  G --> H[Validation / Repair]
  H --> I[execute_sql / call_api]
  I --> J[EvidenceBus]
  J --> K[Answer Verification]
  K --> L[Final Answer + Checkpoints + Dataflow + Trace]

Optional candidate-context LLM SQL with fallback
Optional full-schema LLM SQL with fallback
Optional LLM SQL plus deterministic API verification
Optional LLM controller with optimized backend tool
